'''zhabuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fearnaught|fearnaught]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fearnaught|fearnaught]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhabuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæbivith|zhæbivith]] || [[word:zhæbivij|zhæbivij]] || [[word:zhæbivish|zhæbivish]] || [[word:zhæbivi|zhæbivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabubuvuth|zhabubuvuth]] || [[word:zhabubuvuj|zhabubuvuj]] || [[word:zhabubuvush|zhabubuvush]] || [[word:zhabubuvu|zhabubuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabuvuth|zhabuvuth]] || [[word:zhabuvuj|zhabuvuj]] || [[word:zhabuvush|zhabuvush]] || [[word:zhabuvu|zhabuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabufvuth|zhabufvuth]] || [[word:zhabufvuj|zhabufvuj]] || [[word:zhabufvush|zhabufvush]] || [[word:zhabufvuf|zhabufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhabuvuthu|zhabuvuthu]] || [[word:zhabuvuju|zhabuvuju]] || [[word:zhabuvushu|zhabuvushu]] || [[word:zhabuvuku|zhabuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhabuvuth|zhabuvuth]] || [[word:zhabuvuj|zhabuvuj]] || [[word:zhabuvush|zhabuvush]] || [[word:zhabuvu|zhabuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhabuvuthul|zhabuvuthul]] || [[word:zhabuvujul|zhabuvujul]] || [[word:zhabuvushul|zhabuvushul]] || [[word:zhabuvukul|zhabuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhabuvuthuthu|zhabuvuthuthu]] || [[word:zhabuvujuju|zhabuvujuju]] || [[word:zhabuvushushu|zhabuvushushu]] || [[word:zhabuvuku|zhabuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhabuvuthun|zhabuvuthun]] || [[word:zhabuvujun|zhabuvujun]] || [[word:zhabuvushun|zhabuvushun]] || [[word:zhabuvukun|zhabuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhabuvuthuoro|zhabuvuthuoro]] || [[word:zhabuvujuoro|zhabuvujuoro]] || [[word:zhabuvushuoro|zhabuvushuoro]] || [[word:zhabuvukuoro|zhabuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
